visual_findings.label: Facial Expression
visual_findings.summary: Neutral to slightly engaged expression; no overt signs of distress, confusion, or emotional flattening.
visual_findings.evidence: Patient maintains steady eye contact with camera; facial muscles show minimal movement beyond speech-related changes; no visible signs of agitation or apathy.

visual_findings.label: Gaze and Attention
visual_findings.summary: Consistent visual attention directed toward camera; no signs of disengagement or wandering gaze.
visual_findings.evidence: Patient’s eyes remain focused on the camera throughout the clip; no frequent shifts in gaze or fixation on external objects.

body_findings.label: Posture and Movement
body_findings.summary: Stable posture; minimal body movement observed.
body_findings.evidence: Patient remains seated and relatively still; no signs of fidgeting, restlessness, or motor coordination issues.

voice_findings.label: Speech Fluency
voice_findings.summary: Speech is fluent with occasional pauses and self-corrections; no evidence of word-finding difficulty or anomia.
voice_findings.evidence: Patient speaks in complete sentences with natural rhythm; minor hesitations occur but do not disrupt communication.

voice_findings.label: Speech Clarity
voice_findings.summary: Speech is clear and intelligible; no slurring or articulation errors observed.
voice_findings.evidence: All phonemes are clearly articulated; no distortion or reduced intelligibility noted.

content_findings.label: Self-Reported Routine
content_findings.summary: Patient describes daily routine including waking time, driving, and eating breakfast while driving.
content_findings.evidence: Patient states: 'I wake up at six and drive to the marathon. I take the breakfast during my driving.'

content_findings.label: Cognitive Self-Awareness
content_findings.summary: Patient demonstrates awareness of daily activities and self-reports routine without signs of confusion or disorientation.
content_findings.evidence: Patient speaks coherently about personal schedule and actions without repetition, contradiction, or loss of context.

screening_summary: The patient demonstrates coherent speech, stable attention, and appropriate self-report of daily activities without signs of cognitive impairment. No observable risk factors or impairment-like signals are present in this single clip.
evidence_against_risk: No speech disfluencies or word-finding difficulties
No signs of disorientation or memory loss in self-reported content
Stable gaze and posture suggest intact attention and motor control
alternative_explanations: The patient may be describing a routine without cognitive difficulty
The clip may not capture a full range of cognitive functions
The patient may be well-compensated for any underlying condition
emotional_assessment_findings: No observable signs of distress or anxiety
risk_control_suggestions: Consider routine follow-up if new symptoms emerge
future_risk_trend_summary: Limited predictive value from a single clip; longitudinal assessment recommended if concerns arise.
context_notes: This is a single-clinic screening-grade observation, not diagnostic.
No caregiver or interviewer input is available for comparison.
Patient self-reports routine without apparent cognitive strain.
disclaimer: Research demo only. This output is not a diagnosis and must not be used as a standalone medical decision.
